untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'consolidation or congestion pattern' and 'body color influences performance in different market conditions' which cannot be expressed with available indicators. BULL_MARKET and BEAR_MARKET are not in ALLOWED_REGIMES (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are allowed). Performance metrics (success_rate_bull, average_rise_pct, etc.) cannot be translated into entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: Translated core gap-up doji conditions: (1) gap up = close > prev_close, (2) doji = near-zero body, (3) high volume required. Exit on reversal. Missing: consolidation pattern detection, body color conditional logic, specific performance thresholds by market regime. The original signal description is qualitative and requires market regime classification not available in allowed operators.
